resetPasswordTemplate.subject: Reset your password for %APP_NAME%
resetPasswordTemplate.body:
Hello,

Follow this link to reset your %APP_NAME% password for your %EMAIL% account.

%LINK%

If you didn’t ask to reset your password, you can ignore this email.

Thanks,

Your %APP_NAME% team

verifyEmailTemplate.subject: Verify your email for %APP_NAME%
verifyEmailTemplate.body:
Hello %DISPLAY_NAME%,

Follow this link to verify your email address.

%LINK%

If you didn’t ask to verify this address, you can ignore this email.

Thanks,

Your %APP_NAME% team

changeEmailTemplate.subject: Your sign-in email was changed for %APP_NAME%
changeEmailTemplate.body:
Hello %DISPLAY_NAME%,

Your sign-in email for %APP_NAME% was changed to %NEW_EMAIL%.

If you didn’t ask to change your email, follow this link to reset your sign-in email.

%LINK%

Thanks,

Your %APP_NAME% team

revertSecondFactorAdditionTemplate.subject: You've added 2 step verification to your %APP_NAME% account.
revertSecondFactorAdditionTemplate.body:
Hello %DISPLAY_NAME%,

Your account in %APP_NAME% has been updated with %SECOND_FACTOR% for 2-step verification.

If you didn't add this 2-step verification, click the link below to remove it.

%LINK%

Thanks,

Your %APP_NAME% team
